feed.title: SAP Community - API Management
feed.subtitle: API Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Using Basic Authentication in SAP API Proxy Preflow
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to do basic authentication while calling from external application to APIM. I have the API proxy added to Product and then Application also in API Business Hub Enterprise. I got the Application secret and key. Can I share them with the external calling application so that they can use it to authenticate? I tried through postman but getting 401 error.

entry.title: How to create a Key Value Map with scope Organization, APIProxy
entry.content:
Dear All,

I couldn't find any help on how to create a KVM with the scope organization or apiproxy. The default is written as environment. The UI is also not giving any option.

entry.title: Add payment terms description (TEXT1) from T052U table in the response of API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content:
Hi Everyne,

I am working on a special requirement that needs  the Payment term description into the response of standard API_BUSINESS_PARTNER. Currently it provides only payment term. I understand the description of payment term is available in standard table T052U - TEXT1.  But to bring description is it possible to add the field in the standard API and write custom logic to fill the data into the field?

 

Thank you in advance

Sivaprasad

entry.title: Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I am getting error while activating API Management Capability in Integration Suit of Trail account . 

"Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed".
 
Deleted Integration Suit subscription and created again but same error is popping up .. other capabilities are getting added .
 
pls advise . 
 
API Management

entry.title: 404 undocumented error in Integration Suite Learning Journey in GW SAMPLE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am recentlyexperiencing a 404 Undocumented error in the learning journey : https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite 

The error occurs while we try to test the GET response to the API created from the GWSAMPLE BASIC .

Can anyone please help me out in this case. I am also attaching the SS of the same.

SAP Integration Suite API Management

entry.title: Reading of IP Address and check if it is whitelisted in the key value mapping in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Dear Team,
I have a requirement where i need to check the IP address is whitelisted or not using KeyValueMapping in SAP APIM.
My customer will trigger the request from their application. In my case i am using the postman. As a part of header i am able to see the IP Address which is getting stored in the header X-Forwarded for. Now i need to check if the IP Address is present in the key value map if it exists then i need to proceed with the next steps. Other wise it should throw the error as invalid IP. I have defined the value mapping as well with list of ip addresses. If I am using the parameter from postman then it is checking the key and accordingly it is giving the results. But my customer will not pass any parameter. So i need to store the IP address and check in the key value maps dynamically. Please help me on this with steps. 

Regards
Santosh

entry.title: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an OData Batch Request?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to send a batch request following the OData V4 Guideline: https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_ReferencinganETag

My request body and the response is:

In my batch request, I tried to read an entity with Content-ID:1 and use this Content-ID as the referenced Etag in the If-Match part for the PATCH request. The response said my second request's syntax is wrong.

entry.title: Custom APIs/Modifying standard Apis
entry.content:
I have a requirement which I have to call SAP API from an external agent via POST only. I have identified a similar SAC Api, /v1/scim/User/{id} , which has similar functionality but does not fulfil the requirement. For the API call requirement, it should be something like the following.

POST /getUser/{id} - > Get user details based on id
POST /deleteUser/{id} - > Delete user based on id
POST /updateUser/{id} -> Update user based on id

Is this achievable in SAC or is there a custom workaround to it.

Thank you

entry.title: API for display CK13N result
entry.content:
Hello, Experts,

Is there any API can be used to read costing run data like CK13N ?

 

RGDS Joanna Qiu

entry.title: How to get UUID of WBS element using API in s4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create Project Demand (Resources) using external Web Service API.

The API I used is this one.

And in this API, one of the mandatory field WBS element is needed to enter as UUID value (ReferencedObjectUUID).

So, to able to retrieve UUID of WBS element, we will need to use WBS element API and WBS element APIs are depracted.

So, I used Enterprise Project API instead and able to retrieve WBS element UUID of Project Element ID by using /A_EnterpriseProjectElement entity with get method.

 

But the problem here is that the API can retrieve only UUID of Project Element IDs as WBS element UUID.

*Green highlighted one is Parent Project ID and yellow highlighted are Project Element IDs.

And when I want to choose Parent Project ID (Test260801) as WBS element, the API can only show Parent Project UUID and cannot retrieve UUID of that Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID.

And when I enter the Parent Project UUID in ReferencedObjectUUID field, "WBS element does not exist" error occurs.

Parent Project UUID

Error

So, I would like to know that how can I retrieve UUID of Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID using API (or) is there any workaround that is possible to do so?

If you have any experience (or) idea about this case, could you please kindly answer for me.

 

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: CLOSED
entry.content: CLOSED

entry.title: API Management Principal Propagation for BizHub Enterprise Application User to OData API Provider
entry.content:
** * Updated Question ***

Here is an updated description of the scenario we are trying to find a solution for:

What is required (how) to allow users registered with API Management to call an API Proxy that uses an API Provider for an OData service in an ECC backend that propagates the user to the ECC system? No Cloud Integration involved. There is no existing IdP jwt already available from any other application login. 

*** Original Question ***

Hello. I am having difficulties developing a solution for a specific API Management use case. I've done a ton of studying and have a current theory of where my challenge lies but I'm not sure if it's correct, if maybe the use case is not possible, or if another solution is a better practice. 

We have a successful integration where a user that exists in BHE (Biz Hub Enterprise) calls API Management with Basic Authentication. This is passed to Cloud Integration where the call to the ECC backend (virtual host) uses Principal Propagation. The backend service from the iFlow receiver is an XI Proxy adapter call. The user successfully maps to the user in ECC and all is well. This is accomplished with a simple BasicAuth decode policy in the API Proxy. 

The intent now is to call an API Proxy that is connected through an API Provider and skip the Cloud Integration. The service is OData. We can call the OData service just fine directly into ECC. The challenge is using the BHE user to call the service, providing the correct credential information, and getting the Cloud Connector to accept this so it can convert to the x.509 certificate. Most everything I've read seems to lean to the idea that there needs to be a user token exchange either with an existing JWT from an IdP or by creating your own new JWT. Thing is, haven't been able to figure that out. I did create a generic OAuth service to get an access_token but this doesn't seem to be the user_token that's needed as well. 

My first question is, does this use case seem technically feasible. BHE user, not previously logged in (aka service user for a third party app), calling API Proxy that uses API Provider for OData call to ECC on premise via Principal Propagation.

Additional info:

  • The current token service has been tried with client_credentials and password grant types (yes - I do understand that client_credentials doesn't have a subject and this could very be why this use case is no go).
  • The Cloud Connector virtual host does have the check box selected for 'System Certificate for Logon'. 
  • The API Provider is configured for Prin.Prop authentication.
  • Calling the service with Basic Auth settings in Postman yields this error: "Invalid SAP-Connectivity-Authentication header value: Basic YXB..." which hints that I'm on the right track with the sap connectivity service help of https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/configure-principal-propagation-via-corporate-idp-embedded-token 
    • I'm not providing that header value - SAP is doing this somewhere in the chain. 
  • Cloud Connector never shows the user hit for the call so I know the signal is never getting that far. It's rejecting in API Management somewhere. 
  • Users exist fine in our Corporate IdP that is proxy from IAS. I don't think this is a user setup problem.

Not sure what else to provide as this seems to be a complex setup and has lots of moving pieces. 

Anyhow, end result is that users A, B, and C that exist in BHE can call the service and get mapped in ECC for the call. 

I can provide any other details if anyone is willing/knows maybe what to do or where to look. My gut says this is edging towards not possible but hoping there's API Policies that might get the job done. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data to CPI via SAP API Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send request to SAP CPI via API Management.

But I am facing "401 Unauthorized" error while connecting to CPI though I have maintained correct credential in KeyValue Map. (CSRF token is unchecked in CPI HTTP adapter)

Using same credentials I am able to call CPI endpoint directly from Postman send data successfully.

I tried to test from both API Management and Postman(by calling API endpoint) but no luck. Also tried removing all the other policies.

Can someone help me understand if we have to do any kind of whitelisting or additional roles to be added to call CPI from APIM?

Below is the screen from APIM Debug :

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Madhura

entry.title: Unable to update SAP APIM file resource using API Business Hub Enterprise APIs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to update/create a file resource for an API in SAP APIM portal using the API BHE APIs.

I am able to retrieve the file resources for any particular API using the below URL:

GET https://<API tenant URL>/apiportal/api/1.0/Management.svc/APIProxies('<APIName>')/fileResources

However, while trying to create a new resource or update an existing one I am facing HTTP 403 (Forbidden error). I am not sure if the payload is incorrect or the method itself is not allowed, but I couldn't find any documentation for updating fileResources, policies or defaultFaultRules using the BHE APIs.

This is the payload I am using to update fileResources:

{"id":"<unique id of the resource>","name":"<Name of script>","scope":"APIPROXY","type":"js","content":"<javascript code>"}

I have already gone through this blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/exploring-api-portal-and-api-business-hub-enterprise-apis-of-sap/ba-p/13540879

But there is no entry for fileResources. Any other documentation on this would be helpful too.

Thanks.

entry.title: Attachment in Purchase Order API
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to create Purchase Order using API in S/4 Hana on premise system and found API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV is available.

Is it possible to post/read attachment using this API. If this is not possible kindly let me know if there is any other alternative way.

Thank You

Deepthi

entry.title: update print queue item status
entry.content:
Hi

I can retrieve print queue items through the API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV/RetrieveNextQueueItem and it seems to update the status to 'Transmitted' when we send a request. How can I update the status to 'Failed' or 'Successful' of a print queue item?

Thanks in advance.

JP

entry.title: SCIM SuccessFactors API - Update the "name"
entry.content:
Hi folks!,

I'm suffering some errors with the IPS - SAC replication due to the field "name" of an user is empty.

I checked the user in SuccessFactors and it "seems" ok, but if I perform a API call with Postman I can see that is empty. I don't know how to fix that manually so my idea was to fill it via API call (with PATCH)

Below the GET where you can see that the "name" is empty.

And here the PATCH to fill the "name". It doesn't generate error, but is not changing anything. So without an error I can not understand what is failing (tested with op "replace" and "add"

Any clue regarding why the PATCH is not doing the change (and is not generating error) ?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Business One API Gateway | Report orientation
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm faced with the following problem: when I receive a report via the Gateway API in base64 format, the file comes in vertical orientation (portrait), while I need landscape format, which is set in the Page Setup in the report. Is there any way to fix this?

I would be grateful for any advice!

entry.title: SAP BTP Integration Suite set-up problem
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using SAP BTP Trial and I want to install sap Integration Suite. I followed the tutorial : link
I'm currently at step 4 to "automatically assing roles and create service instances using booster" but I'm having a problem : 

It says that I have not subscribed to SAP Integration Suite. I checked my Users roles, my entitlements and my subscriptions but there are all complete. Does anybody understand why it's not working ? (I've done it again with ou without deleting the navigation data)

entry.title: Posting Folders From Open Connectors to AWS S3 Bucket
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, How I Post Folders to AWS S3 Bucket using Open Connectors. Authentication is done and also I have a instance but I do not understand how I Execute to send Folder. Please suggest.
